title: Black
why_this_song: Black by Pearl Jam (1991) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Oh, the pictures have all been washed in black
I take a walk outside, I'm surrounded by some kids at play
All the pictures have all been washed in black
All the love gone bad turned my world to black

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "everything" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "everything" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And now my bitter hands cradle broken glass

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Black", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Black", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Black" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Black" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Black" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Black", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
